title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Wire Hand Saw Camping Gear Hiking Blade - 24 Inch
description:
The ASR Outdoor hand saw wire tool was designed with compact size in mind. It weighs just .12lbs and will easily fit inside just about any pocket, backpack or camping gear bag, making it easier to carry than other standard chainsaws. Made of 304 stainless steel with plastic handles, the hand saw is corrosion resistant so you can count on it in inclement weather. It features super sharp blades that will not dull even after many uses, making it the ideal portable cutting tool while camping and hiking. The hand tool saw comes with grooved, ergonomic plastic handles that provide rigidity and comfortable grip to help prevent slippage during use. The wide handles will help protect your hands when pulling to cut wood efficiently and safely

ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Wire Hand Saw Camping Gear Hiking Blade - 24 Inch

The ASR Outdoor hand saw wire tool was designed with compact size in mind. It weighs just .12lbs and will easily fit inside just about any pocket, backpack or camping gear bag, making it easier to carry than other standard chainsaws.

Key Features

  • LIGHTWEIGHT & COMPACT - ASR Outdoor hand saw wire tool was designed to be easier to carry than other standard chainsaws. Wire saw fits easily inside your pocket, backpack or camping gear bag for use during outdoor activities like hiking and backpacking.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of 304 stainless steel, hand saw is corrosion-resistant; count on it in unfavorable weather. Super sharp blades that will not dull after many uses, ideal for cutting through wood and other outdoor materials in an emergency.
  • COMFORTABLE GRIP HANDLE - Hand tool comes with grooved plastic handles for rigidity and comfortable grip to help prevent slippage during use. 2.75” wide handle will effectively protect your hands when pulling to cut wood efficiently.
  • VERSATILE CUTTING TOOL - In addition to camping, wire saws are great practical cutting tools for rubber, plastic, soft metal and wood. Use it for fishing, hunting, outdoor adventures and basic home improvement.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Length: 24”; Thickness: 1/16”; Handle width: 2.75”; Material: 304 stainless steel: Colors: chrome, orange; Weight: .12lbs (1.92oz)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROWS24
  • UPC: 810058481917
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: 24 in

Made of 304 stainless steel with plastic handles, the hand saw is corrosion resistant so you can count on it in inclement weather. It features super sharp blades that will not dull even after many uses, making it the ideal portable cutting tool while camping and hiking.

The hand tool saw comes with grooved, ergonomic plastic handles that provide rigidity and comfortable grip to help prevent slippage during use. The wide handles will help protect your hands when pulling to cut wood efficiently and safely.

In addition to camping and outdoor uses, these tools are great for cutting other materials like plastic, rubber and soft metal. Use it while hunting, fishing and basic home improvement projects.
